ImageDescription.value:
Trondheim 18-23 June 2017: The science festival Starmus IV in Trondheim, Norway. Hosted by Norwegian University of Science and Technology (NTNU).​

Trondheim Spektrum 20 June: Stephen Hawking Science Medal Ceremony. Jean-Michel Jarre and Neil deGrasse Tyson received the medal. Crown Princess Mette Marit, Jean-Michel Jarre, Neil deGrasse Tyson, Crown Prince Haakon.

Photo: Max Alexander / Starmus
